Bash(gh pr create --title "feat\(amazon\): Add stealth extraction for improved success rate" --body "$\(cat <<''EOF''
## Summary
- Implements full stealth Playwright extraction for Amazon prices to improve success rate from ~10% to target 50-60%
- Adds browser identity rotation with 12 realistic profiles \(Mac/Windows/Linux, Chrome/Firefox/Safari/Edge\)
- Implements human-like behavior simulation \(Bezier curve mouse movements, natural scrolling, random delays\)
- Adds Redis-backed identity burn tracking \(24-hour cooldown after CAPTCHA detection\)
- Feature flag controlled via `AMAZON_STEALTH_ENABLED` environment variable

## Changes
- **New module**: `services/amazon_stealth/` with identities, identity_manager, behaviors, and extractor
- **Modified**: `services/price_service.py` - integrated stealth extraction with fallback to legacy
- **Modified**: `services/price_metrics.py` - added stealth-specific logging
- **Modified**: `config.py` - added `AMAZON_STEALTH_ENABLED` flag
- **New tests**: 29 unit tests for all stealth components

## Test plan
- [x] All 29 Amazon stealth unit tests pass
- [x] Full test suite passes \(no regressions\)
- [ ] Deploy to staging and test against real Amazon URLs
- [ ] Monitor success rate metrics over 24-48 hours
- [ ] Verify identity rotation and burn tracking work as expected

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code]\(https://claude.ai/code\)
EOF
\)")
